name: Netmarble Joybomb Inc.
summary: Netmarble Joybomb Inc. develops and publishes mobile, PC, and console games in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau. The company was formerly known as JoyBomb Entertainment Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Netmarble Joybomb Inc. in December 2014. Netmarble Joybomb Inc. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
